subcodes.first_line: The servant in attendance hath presented that which thou didst send unto him. We have heard it with an ear that hath no likeness in all the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر العبد الحاضر و عرض ما ارسلته عنده انا سمعناه باذن لیس لها شبه فی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
